title: Edge Condition
description: Records how an assembly terminates at its perimeter. Typed by edge treatment: fascia, drip edge, gravel stop, coping, parapet cap, or termination bar.

edge_id.description: Unique identifier for this edge condition.

title.description: Human-readable description of this edge condition.

assembly_ref.description: Reference to the assembly system this edge terminates.

status.description: Current status of this edge condition record.

control_layers_terminated.description: Control layers that terminate at this edge.

detail_ref.description: Reference to edge detail drawing or specification.

notes.description: Additional notes about this edge condition.
